description: SALUS by Adera award winning dev, Mountain Resort inspired com. Gorgeous 3 level South facing townhome. Featuring 4 bdrm with 2bhrms. Main floor boasts a bright and open layout with tons of natura 1 light, Beautiful kitchen finished with granite countertops (kitchen island), stainless-steel app and designer cabinets. Newly designed bathrooms and updated lighting. garage and covered carport for two full size vehicles. Corner loc with street and visitor parking. close to pre-school, elementary/high school & bus stop. Easy access to Tsaw/Ladner/Rmd/Vanc. Clubhouse features spa/swim, /hot tub/sauna/steam shower/fitness centre/roof deck.
